raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 38,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet wiꞥſch fazzija: Man-
am Dehlaın ne buhs ar jums
o-eet/ jo winna Brahlis irr
omirriſ/ un tas irr weens pats
flizzis/ ja tam jaſchn kahda Lik-
a uhs Zettu uſeetn/ kur juhs
feet/ tad juhs mannuſ firmus
Nattuſ/ ar leelem Sird-Eh-
eem Bedrê noweddifeet.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "s to pee tew atkaſ ne atweddi-
chu/ tad nokau mannuſ diwi
Dehluſ/ dohd man winnu Roh-
kâ/ tad es winnu atpakkat pee
tew weddischu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "mehs ne no-eefim/ jo tas Wihrē
irr us mumſ fazzijis/jums ne buhe
mannu Waignu redſeht/ ja juhſu
jaunakajſ Brahlis jums newa
klaht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fazzija Israëls: Ka-
pehz eﬀat juhs tik kann pee man-
darrijuſchi/ tam Wihran paſaz-
zidami/ ka jums wehl weens
Brahlis effus?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee fazzija: Tas Wihrē
jautaja jautadams pehz mums/
un pehz minhſu Raddu/ un fazzi-
ja: Ar juhſu Tehws wehl dſihws
irr jums wehl weens Brah-
lis? tad athildejam mehs win-
nam/ ka wiꞥſch mums jautaja/
Eſſam tad mehs to ihſti finnaji-
schi/ ka tas buhtu fazzijis: wed-
deet juhſu Brahli ſchurp?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fazzija Juha us I-
fraëln ſawu Tehwu: Suhti to
Pnifi ar manni/ tad mehs fa-
nemſimees/ un no-eefim/ ka mehs
dſihwojam/ un ne mirſtam/ ir-
mehs/ ir tu pats/ ir muhſu Behr-
nini.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Es gatwoſchu preekſch win-
na/ no mannas Rohkas buhs tew
winnu praſſiht/ ja es to pee tew
atpakkat ne weddischu/ tad es fa-
wu Muhſhu preekſch tew gribbu
noſeedſis buht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo ja mehs ne buhtum
kawejuſchees/ mehs jaw tagad oh-
tru Reiſi buhtum pahrnahkuſchi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fazzija winnu Tehws
Israëls us winneem: Buhs
tam nu ta buht/ tad darrajt to/
neimneet no tahs Semmes wiſso-
teiza-
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
